expectations.text: 没有覆盖已有的 T120/task.md（文件内容未被修改）
expectations.evidence: T120/task.md still contains 'status: open'; response.md confirms no new file was created and existing file was preserved

expectations.text: response.md 报告了检测到重复任务
expectations.evidence: response.md contains '已存在' and '重复派发' — explicitly states T120 task file already exists with status open

expectations.text: 向 Harvey 说明了跳过原因
expectations.evidence: response.md has a '向 Harvey 的汇报' section explaining the skip reason: task already exists with status open, and offers to re-dispatch if Harvey explicitly requests it
